testCases.title: Cart Accessibility / Manual Test
testCases.notes: Marked Manual/Relocated in CSV — skipped per suite instructions

Currency switched from USD to EUR; cart totals updated to EUR values. AGENT-TEST-Low-Stock-Fixture showed EUR 0.00 (no EUR price configured) with 'no longer available' warning — correct behavior per BL-CURR-001.
Switched back from EUR to USD; cart totals restored to USD. Low-Stock-Fixture EUR-price gap is expected product-data behavior.
Currency picker displays all supported currencies: AUD, CNY, CZK, EUR, GBP, GHS, PTS, USD, XPT. All options visible in dropdown.

testCases.title: Multi-Org User Cart Context Switch
testCases.notes: Requires @td(USER_MULTI_ORG.email) — MULTI_ORG_USER_EMAIL account (ricreyacrouyi-3425@yopmail.com) not configured for agent pool slot 1. Multi-org cart context switch cannot be executed without a second organizational context in this session.

testCases.title: Cart Persists Across Org Switch
testCases.notes: Same blocker as CART-052 — requires multi-org user sign-in.

testCases.title: Pack-Size Product Quantity Enforcement
testCases.notes: Requires @td(PROD_PACK_SIZE.sku) = BULK-PAPER-001. Alias PROD_PACK_SIZE not configured in aliases.json; product not accessible via storefront URL. PACK_SIZE_SKU env var set but product not seeded into B2B virtual catalog.

testCases.title: Pack-Size Minimum Order Quantity Warning
testCases.notes: Same blocker as CART-054 — pack-size product not accessible.

Radio-button coupon exclusivity verified via adapted approach: with QA10OFF active (custom input readonly), applied preset 'ONE' ($10 off) → QA10OFF auto-removed server-side. Confirms BL-PROMO-003 exclusivity enforcement. Direct SUPER input while QA10OFF active not possible (input readonly by design).

Coupon QA10OFF visible in 'Discount & coupons' sidebar on cart/checkout page with Remove coupon button active. Discount -$186.47 shown in Order Summary. Cart/checkout is single-page hybrid; coupon persists through the flow. Navigation to /checkout redirected to /cart (by design).

testCases.title: Save for Later — Personal + Org User Contexts
testCases.notes: Requires [PRE:SIGNIN_AS:ORG_USER] sign-in as ORG_USER (Emily Johnson / TestPass123!) and CFG_RING product URL. Executing this test would destroy the current session state and the test requires a separate isolated run with the org user account.

testCases.title: Mixed Cart — USD + PTS Items Display
testCases.notes: LOYALTY_VIP_USER signed in (AGENT-TEST-vip@test.virtocommerce.com / TestVip1!). Cart empty — no pre-seeded mixed cart (USD + PTS items). Mixed cart state requires server-side injection via GraphQL runner (companion suite 050/VCST-5101). Cannot establish PTS+USD mixed cart via browser UI alone for fresh user session.

testCases.title: Mixed Cart — Points-Only Checkout Path
testCases.notes: Same blocker as CART-071 — mixed cart state not available.

testCases.title: Mixed Cart — Currency Split Order Summary
testCases.notes: Same blocker as CART-071 — mixed cart state not available.

bugs.title: TEST_SKU (XKC-38084072) returns 404 on storefront PDP
bugs.expected: Product detail page for TEST_SKU (XKC-38084072) loads successfully
bugs.actual: 404 Not Found — product slug/variation parent not accessible on storefront. Product is a variation parent that cannot be accessed directly via SKU slug.
bugs.notes: TEST_SKU=XKC-38084072 is a variation parent without a standalone PDP. Substituted with Animal Crossing GUID URL (PROD_FULL_FIELD_COVERAGE) to unblock CART-031..CART-039. Needs fixture remediation or env var update.
